name: render_sequence_with_graph
description: Render a sequence through Movie Render Graph.

map_path.description: Optional map asset path to force on the queued job.

job_name.description: Optional queue job label. Defaults to the sequence name.

output_path.description: Requested output path. The current scaffold keeps graph-authored output settings authoritative.

returns.description: Render request summary including the configured job and current rendering state.
